# Mochi Mango Arcade

Mochi Mango Arcade is a free browser-game portal by Fire Dragon Interactive.

- Canonical URL: https://www.mochimangoarcade.com/
- Games: 392
- Playable now: 392
- Universes: 14
- Price: Free to play
- Account: Optional; not required to play
- Merchandise: Concept preview; purchasing is not currently available
- Publisher: Fire Dragon Interactive
- Catalogue data: https://www.mochimangoarcade.com/assets/data/games.json
- Machine-readable facts: https://www.mochimangoarcade.com/assets/data/site-facts.json
- Sitemap: https://www.mochimangoarcade.com/sitemap.xml

Game pages provide title, genre, character, universe, objective, version and play link. All characters and game artwork are original to the publisher.
